name: @jeswr/solid-sdk-workspace
description: The @jeswr Solid suite workspace — reusable SDK packages and private deployable applications
author: Jesse Wright <63333554+jeswr@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint --affected --concurrency=4
scripts.lint:root: biome check scripts test guardrails skills package.json turbo.json vitest.config.ts && pnpm run check:lockfile-transport && pnpm run check:app-workspace && pnpm run check:fetch
scripts.gate: pnpm run lint:root && turbo run lint build typecheck test test:root --affected --concurrency=4
scripts.gate:full: turbo run lint lint:root build typecheck test test:root --concurrency=4
